title: Röhrchen
description: Automate the transfer of items in large quantities efficiently and beautifully.
body:
Röhrchen [rˈøːɾçən] provides pipes which can transfer items in large
quantities from one place to another.

As of right now, it provides Glass Pipes.
These can only be placed in a clear way where always only one
input and one output are possible. Each input begins with a Pump,
which also determines the rate of the transferred items. The output of a pipe
can be either kept empty or directly lead into a container like a Chest or a Barrel.

***

### FAQ

#### What Does _“Röhrchen”_ Mean?

Röhrchen is the diminutive form of the word _“pipe”_ in German. An alternative spelling would be _“Roehrchen”_.

#### Is This a BuildCraft Port?

No! This is a _reimagination_ of BuildCraft. It does not rely on any of it's source code or assets.

#### Why can I Only Transport Items and why are the Capabilities it has so Limiting?

The mod still is in beta. Transferring fluids and energy are planned. More features to improve the complexibility a pipe network can have are planned as well.
